steps.title: Use the shared point
steps.content: Substitute the shared point $(q,17)$ into both equations: $$-q-17w=-340$$ $$2q-17w=17$$

steps.title: Eliminate the x-coordinate
steps.content: Double the first equation, then add: $$-2q-34w=-680$$ $$2q-17w=17$$ $$-51w=-663$$ Divide by $-51$. The answer is 13.
